patterns.title: Children's Elastic Waist Skirt (Size 6–8) – Free Printable Pattern
patterns.notes: Print at 100% scale and verify the test square before cutting. Includes waistband and skirt panel pieces for childrens sizes 6.

patterns.title: Children's Elastic Waist Skirt (Size 4–6) – Free Printable Pattern
patterns.notes: Sized slightly shorter and narrower than the 6–8 pattern. Seam allowances are included.

patterns.title: Christmas Felt Star Ornament Template
patterns.notes: Includes star outline and placement guides for embroidery details. Optimized for print-friendly view with minimal images.

patterns.title: Beginner Cotton Tote Bag Cutting Layout & Template
patterns.notes: Cutting diagram for body, straps, and facing pieces laid out on 44" wide cotton fabric. Designed for less than 2 yards of fabric.

patterns.title: Modern Sampler Quilt – Block 1 Foundation Pattern
patterns.notes: Printable foundation or cutting diagram for Block 1 of the Modern Sampler Quilt series. Includes 1/4" seam allowances and labeling for each section.

tutorials.title: Beginner Cotton Tote Bag (Under 2 Yards)
tutorials.summary: Sew a sturdy cotton tote bag with boxed corners and shoulder straps using less than 2 yards of fabric. Perfect for confident beginners.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Beginner Cotton Tote Bag (Under 2 Yards)

This step-by-step tutorial walks you through cutting, pressing, and sewing a lined cotton tote bag with boxed corners and comfortable straps. It is designed for beginners and uses less than 2 yards of medium-weight cotton fabric.
tutorials.materialsSummary: 1.75 yards of medium-weight cotton fabric, fusible fleece for structure, thread, and basic sewing notions.

tutorials.title: Reversible Canvas Tote Bag with Pockets
tutorials.summary: Learn how to sew a fully lined, reversible canvas tote bag with interior pockets and boxed corners.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Reversible Canvas Tote Bag with Pockets

This intermediate-friendly project teaches you how to add lining, pockets, and boxed corners to create a reversible canvas tote bag.
tutorials.materialsSummary: 3 yards of sturdy cotton canvas, fusible fleece, thread, and basic sewing notions.

tutorials.title: Install a Zipper in a Lined Pouch (Beginner)
tutorials.summary: Practice installing a zipper while sewing a simple lined pouch, perfect for beginners.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Install a Zipper in a Lined Pouch

This beginner tutorial shows you how to prepare your pieces, align the zipper tape, and sew a neat zipper into a lined pouch.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Two rectangles of cotton fabric, lining, a 14" nylon zipper, and matching thread.

tutorials.title: Install a Zipper in a Pillow Back (Beginner Tutorial)
tutorials.summary: Learn how to add a discreet zipper closure to the back of a throw pillow cover.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Install a Zipper in a Pillow Back

Follow these steps to insert a zipper into the back seam of a pillow cover for a removable, washable cushion.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Pillow front and back pieces, a nylon zipper, thread, and optional fusible fleece for stability.

tutorials.title: Children's Elastic Waist Skirt (Size 6–8) – Free Pattern
tutorials.summary: A simple gathered skirt with an elastic waistband sized for children 6–8, featuring a free printable pattern.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Children's Elastic Waist Skirt (Size 6–8)

This beginner-friendly skirt uses a full, gathered panel and a comfortable elastic waistband. Download the free printable pattern and follow along step by step.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Quilting cotton, 1" woven elastic, coordinating thread, and basic sewing notions.

tutorials.title: Children's Elastic Waist Skirt (Size 4–6) – Free Pattern
tutorials.summary: Sew a quick elastic waist skirt for children in sizes 4–6 using a free printable pattern.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Children's Elastic Waist Skirt (Size 4–6)

This pattern is drafted for younger children and includes full instructions for cutting, sewing, and inserting the elastic waistband.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Lightweight quilting cotton, 1" woven elastic, thread, and basic notions.

tutorials.title: 15-Minute Fabric Scrap Bookmark
tutorials.summary: Turn tiny fabric scraps into a flat bookmark in just 15 minutes—an ideal first project for new sewists.
tutorials.contentHtml:
15-Minute Fabric Scrap Bookmark

This ultra-quick project uses narrow strips of fabric and simple straight seams, making it perfect for absolute beginners.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Small cotton scraps, optional fusible fleece, and matching thread.

tutorials.title: Easy Envelope Pillow Cover
tutorials.summary: Sew a removable envelope-style pillow cover with crisp edges and no zippers.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Easy Envelope Pillow Cover

This project shows you how to measure, cut, and sew an envelope back pillow cover that fits snugly over your insert.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Home decor weight fabric, coordinating thread, and basic notions.

tutorials.title: Christmas Felt Star Ornament (Free Template)
tutorials.summary: Stitch a simple star-shaped felt ornament with embroidered details using a free printable template.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Christmas Felt Star Ornament

Create charming felt star ornaments for your tree using basic hand stitches and a downloadable template.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Wool blend felt sheets, embroidery floss, stuffing, and ribbon for hanging.

tutorials.title: Beginner Felt Coaster Set
tutorials.summary: Cut and stitch a set of colorful felt coasters—an easy hand-sewing project for beginners.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Beginner Felt Coaster Set

Use wool blend felt and simple stitching to make a coordinating set of drink coasters.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Assorted felt sheets and embroidery floss for decorative edges.

tutorials.title: Modern Sampler Quilt – Part 1: Block 1
tutorials.summary: Start the Modern Sampler Quilt series with a bold, graphic first block and downloadable pattern.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Modern Sampler Quilt – Part 1: Block 1

In Part 1, you will cut and piece the first 12" block of the Modern Sampler Quilt using straight-line piecing techniques.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Assorted quilting cottons for the block plus background fabric and coordinating thread.

tutorials.title: Modern Sampler Quilt – Part 2: HST Block
tutorials.summary: Continue the Modern Sampler Quilt with a half-square triangle block that sharpens your trimming skills.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Modern Sampler Quilt – Part 2: HST Block

Part 2 focuses on making accurate half-square triangles and arranging them into a striking block.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Contrasting quilting cottons for the HSTs plus background fabric.

tutorials.title: Modern Sampler Quilt – Part 3: Improv Block
tutorials.summary: Add a playful improv-pieced block to your Modern Sampler Quilt while exploring color and negative space.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Modern Sampler Quilt – Part 3: Improv Block

Part 3 invites you to loosen up with improv piecing while still keeping your block the correct size.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Scraps of quilting cotton in your chosen palette plus background fabric.

tutorials.title: Quick Strip Baby Quilt
tutorials.summary: Piece a cozy baby quilt from fabric strips in about an hour—great for beginners and last-minute gifts.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Quick Strip Baby Quilt

This tutorial shows you how to cut fabric strips, piece them into a simple top, and add quick quilting for a fast baby gift.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Assorted quilting cotton strips, backing fabric, batting, and thread.

tutorials.title: Walking Foot Grid Quilting on a Throw Quilt
tutorials.summary: Use a walking foot to quilt an even grid on your throw-size quilt for a modern, textured finish.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Walking Foot Grid Quilting

Learn how to mark, baste, and quilt a simple grid using your walking foot for smooth, even stitches.
tutorials.materialsSummary: A basted throw quilt sandwich, quilting thread, and marking tools.

tutorials.title: Modern Straight-Line Quilting with a Walking Foot
tutorials.summary: Master modern straight-line quilting designs using a walking foot on your domestic machine.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Modern Straight-Line Quilting with a Walking Foot

This tutorial demonstrates several straight-line quilting patterns and how to manage bulk with a walking foot.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Practice quilt sandwiches made from quilting cotton, batting, and backing fabric.

tutorials.title: Heirloom Hand-Quilted Throw
tutorials.summary: Take your quilting to the next level with a fully hand-quilted throw that features traditional motifs.
tutorials.contentHtml:
Heirloom Hand-Quilted Throw

This advanced tutorial covers layering, basting, and hand quilting motifs for an heirloom-quality throw quilt.
tutorials.materialsSummary: Quilt top, batting, backing, hand quilting thread, and quilting needles.
